articles.title: Fuel prices are shaping summer plans as boaters hit the water
articles.description:
Gas prices are also impacting boating-related businesses.

The post Fuel prices are shaping summer plans as boaters hit the water appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Gas prices are affecting summer boating plans for Boston residents.
Local boating-related businesses report a decline in customer activity due to rising fuel costs.
Boaters are adjusting their budgets, potentially reducing spending on local services and amenities.
